pr.title: Add max_of_two helper
pr.body: Returns the larger of two integers. For equal inputs, return either value.
pr.author: dev1

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+def max_of_two(a: int, b: int) -> int:
+    if a >= b:
+        return a
+    return b

review_comments.author: reviewer
review_comments.body: Please ensure equal inputs are handled.
